description_long: This is a three-story residential house with a flat roof and a modern, rectangular design. The facade features large, evenly spaced windows arranged in symmetrical rows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front of the house includes a central entryway with a blue door, flanked by multiple windows and small balconies on the upper floors. The building is surrounded by landscaped greenery, including bushes, trees, and a curved pathway lined with conical shrubs and benches. The rear side of the house has private balconies and additional green spaces, enhancing outdoor living. The exterior is primarily finished in light brown brick with white window frames and trim, giving it a clean, contemporary appearance.
description: A modern, three-story house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, balconies, and landscaped surroundings. The exterior is light brown brick with white trim and a central blue entry door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, symmetrical window rows, and the flat brick facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's depth, flat roof, and landscaped path with trees and benches.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying private balconies, green spaces, and the curved pathway with shrubs and benches.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the building's length, balconies, and landscaped area with trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Central blue door with no porch, flush to facade, surrounded by symmetrical windows and minimal decorative elements.
